name: TC-TXN-005 — Transaction List: Filtered by status=SUCCESS and method=MPESA
description:
Verifies transaction list filtering by status=SUCCESS and method=MPESA.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction
**Params:** page=0, size=20, period=month, status=SUCCESS, method=MPESA
**Expected:** HTTP 200 with records where every entry has display_status=Success and payment_method=MPESA.
